LAW AND MOTION 302, OBJECTOR RANDALL PITTMANS' JOINDER TO BESTHINES DAVIS' MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTING FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT IS DENIED. UNDER CCP SECTION 916, THE PERFECTING OF AN APPEAL STAYS PROCEEDINGS IN THE TRIAL COURT UPON THE JUDGMENT OR ORDER APPEALED FROM OR UPON MATTERS EMBRACED THEREIN OR AFFECTED THEREBY, INCLUDING THE ENFORCEMENT OF THE JUDGMENT OR ORDER. THIS COURT'S JANUARY 5, 2016, ORDER GRANTING FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT IS CURRENTLY ON APPEAL AND THEREFORE, PENDING THE APPEAL OF THAT ORDER, THIS COURT DOES NOT HAVE JURISDICTION TO MODIFY OR VACATE THE ORDER. (CCP SECTION 916.) IN THEIR MOTION TO STAY THE APPEAL, OBJECTORS EVEN ADMITTED THAT PENDING THE APPEAL, THIS COURT LACKS JURISDICTION TO HEAR THE INSTANT MOTION. (PLAINTIFF'S RJN EX. 1.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/RU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Enforcing Class Action Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Sep-14-2016 Off Calendar

Randall Pittmans' Joinder To Besthines Davi'S Motion To Vacate Judgment Granting Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Jun-24-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gregory Karasik of Karasik Law Firm telephone number 310-312-6800 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff Jorge Pineda.
Maria Audero of Paul Hastings LLP telephone number 213-683-6307 for Defendant Bank of America, National Association.
Objector Randall Pittman telephone number 213-944-6439 appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.
Objector Besthines Davis telephone number 310-699-6467 appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling.
OBJECTOR RANDALL PITTMAN Randall Pittmans' Joinder To Besthines Davis' Motion To Vacate Judgment Granting Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement is denied. Under CCP section 916, the perfecting of an appeal stays proceedings in the trial court upon the judgment or order appealed from or upon matters embraced therein or affected thereby, including the enforcement of the judgment or order. This Court's January 5, 2016, order granting final approval of class action settlement is currently on appeal and therefore, pending the appeal of that order, this Court does not have jurisdiction to modify or vacate the order. (CCP section 916.) In their motion to stay the appeal, Objectors even admitted that pending the appeal, this Court lacks jurisdiction to hear the instant motion. (Plaintiff's RJN Ex. 1.) Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Richard Ulmer. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/RU)

Motion To Vacate Judgment Granting Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement Pursuant To Ccp 473(B)
Off Calendar Jun-24-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gregory Karasik of Karasik Law Firm telephone number 310-312-6800 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff Jorge Pineda.
Maria Audero of Paul Hastings LLP telephone number 213-683-6307 for Defendant Bank of America, National Association.
Objector Randall Pittman telephone number 213-944-6439 appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.
Objector Besthines Davis telephone number 310-699-6467 appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. OBJECTOR BESTHINES DAVIS' Motion To Vacate Judgment Granting Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement Pursuant To CCP 473(B) is denied. Under CCP section 916, the perfecting of an appeal stays proceedings in the trial court upon the judgment or order appealed from or upon matters embraced therein or affected thereby, including the enforcement of the judgment or order. This Court's January 5, 2016, order granting final approval of class action settlement is currently on appeal and therefore, pending the appeal of that order, this Court does not have jurisdiction to modify or vacate the order. (CCP section 916.) In their motion to stay the appeal, Objectors even admitted that pending the appeal, this Court lacks jurisdiction to hear the instant motion. (Plaintiff's RJN Ex. 1.) Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Richard Ulmer. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/RU)

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Jan-05-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Maria Audero of Paul Hastings LLP telephone number 213-683-6307 for Defendant Bank of America.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court makes a record of the objector and objections filed by Besthines Davis on November 4, 2015. The Court finds there is no basis, based on the objections and pleadings to alter the Court's decision to approve settlement, that the attorney fees requested are justified, that the settlement affords benefits to a large number of class members and the settlement period, and that it conforms to the applicable statute of limitations. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JORGE PINEDA's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement - Final approval granted. Order and judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF JORGE PINEDA's Joint Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Revised Class Action Settlement is taken off calendar as moot. On June 18, 2015, an Order granting preliminary approval was entered. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Gregory N. Karasik, of Karasik Law Firm, Tel. 310.312.6800, for plaintiffs;
Maria A. Audero, of Paul Hastings LLP, Tel. 213.683.6307, for defendants;
Randall Pittman, in pro per, Tel. 213.944.6439, intervenor and objector, appearing via CourtCall.

PLAINTIFF JORGE PINEDA'S Joint Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Revised Class Action Settlement is continued to July 16, 2015, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 (control date only). Counsel shall send the revised notice and revised proposed order to the Court. The Court sets final approving hearing for January 5, 2016, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. Judge Ernest H. Off Calendar Jan-06-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Maria A. Audero, Esq. and Chris A. Jalian, Esq. of Paul Hastings, Tel. 213.683.6143, for defendant and moving party;
Gregory N. Karasik, Esq. of Karasik Law Firm, Tel. 310.312.6800, for plaintiff.

RULING: The matter was discussed/argued. At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement under submission. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Sheryl L. Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Ntc Of Myn And Mtn For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-14-2014 Continued To Dec-02-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement - The tentative ruling was to continue the hearing, on the court's motion, to November 26, 2014, to permit counsel the opportunity to comply with the Court's Order for Supplementary Memorandum of November 3, 2014. Before the hearing, the parties requested to change the hearing date to November 21, 2014. At the hearing, the Court modified the tentative ruling, allowing the continuance to any date after November 26, 2014. The Clerk is to contact the parties to obtain a mutually agreed upon continuance date. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Sheryl L. Sawyer CSR# 5976.
(After hearing, the parties agreed to continue the hearing to December 2, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302.)

Ntc Of Myn And Mtn For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Oct-03-2014 Continued To Nov-14-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gregory N. Karasik, Esq. of Karasik Law Firm, Tel. 310.312.6800, for plaintiff;
Maria A. Audero, Esq. and Chris A. Jalian, Esq. of Paul Hastings LLP, Tel. 213.683.6307/6143, for defendant Bank of America.

RULING: Before hearing, the Court indicated its inclination to deny the motion. The matter was argued and issues such as reversion, risks, etc. were discussed. At the conclusion of argument, the Court continued DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement to November 14, 2014 for further hearing. Plaintiff shall file a supplemental brief no later than October 24, 2014. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR# 5976
